title: December 12
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|December}}
'''December 12''' is the 346th day (347th in leap years) of the year, with 19 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1932|1932]] – [[Steve Binder]] is born.
*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Leslie Schofield]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Stephanie Steele]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Valerie Arem]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 45|''Star Wars Weekly'' 45]] published.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 94|''Star Wars Weekly'' 94]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Heir to the Empire 3|''Heir to the Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Obi-Wan's Adventures]]'' released.
*[[2001]] – [[Francis Batsoni]] dies.
*2001 – [[Jedi Quest 4|''Jedi Quest'' 4]] published.
*2001 – ''[[Star Wars Tales 10]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Lair of Grievous]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2008 – ''[[HoloNet News — Chancellor Palpatine's Approval Rating Falls]]'' podcast released online.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]'' is announced.
*[[2013]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: The Complete Saga]]'' released for [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IOS iOS].
*2013 – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.54|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.54]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story Graphic Novel Adaptation|''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'' Graphic Novel Adaptation]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Age of Republic - Darth Maul 1|''Age of Republic - Darth Maul'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 27|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 27]] published.
*2018 – [[Han Solo - Imperial Cadet 2|''Han Solo - Imperial Cadet'' 2]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars Insider 223|''Star Wars Insider'' 223]] published.
*2023 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Complete First Season]]'' released.
*2023 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Complete Second Season]]'' released.
<noinclude>
